message:
feat(runtime): add zero-copy string access and string intern pool

Zero-copy string access:
- BorrowedString struct for borrowing QuickJS string storage
- borrowString() returns slice without copying
- Useful for read-only operations (comparisons, hashing)

String intern pool:
- StringPool with FNV-1a hash for O(1) lookup
- 256-entry cache for frequently accessed strings
- getGlobalStringPool() for runtime use
- Useful for caching property names, identifiers
